response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level position with 15+ years of experience as a Staff/Senior engineer. While the technical skills align well (TypeScript, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL/SQL, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP work), there is high risk of mismatch on seniority expectations, compensation, and on-site presence in Berlin (currently working remotely for a Brazil-based company). Could be a strong hire if open to a more senior scope or career change, but the role as posted is a poor fit.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL/SQL exposure matching nice-to-haves
Recent AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure work aligns with modern integration needs
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years and Staff/Senior titles vs. entry-level role
On-site Berlin presence unclear; current role appears remote with Brazil-based employers
Likely compensation and scope mismatch could lead to short tenure
